title: scutellaria albida subsp. velenovskyi
intro: Scutellaria albida subsp. velenovskyi, also known as Velenovsky's skullcap, is a subspecies of the Scutellaria albida plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Velenovsky's skullcap include relief from anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and reduced inflammation. Velenovsky's skullcap can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
